headline: The Cash-Flow Fortress The Stryker Stock Bears Keep Missing
summary: While the market fixates on a disruptive quarter for Stryker stock, the company's powerful ability to convert profit into hard cash reveals a deeper, under-appreciated resilience.

headline: Is Procedure Growth Broad-Based Enough to Support ISRG's 2026 Outlook?
summary: ISRG raises its 2026 outlook after strong Q1 results, but can broad-based procedure growth offset emerging headwinds in key U.S. and global markets?

headline: Medtronic (MDT) Just Closed Its $550 Million Scientia Vascular Deal
summary: Medtronic (NYSE:MDT) has completed its $550 million acquisition of Scientia Vascular. The deal brings specialized guidewires and catheters for cerebral vasculature into Medtronic's neurovascular portfolio. Management expects the transaction to be initially minimally dilutive to earnings and to turn accretive in later fiscal years. For investors tracking Medtronic, the Scientia Vascular deal adds another piece to the company’s neurovascular therapy ambitions at a time when the stock trades...

headline: Medtronic appoints veteran J&J exec as first CFO of innovation
summary: Eric Lenard comes to the new position with more than two decades of experience in medtech finance, as Medtronic steps up its investment in innovation.

headline: Medtronic (MDT) Stock After Recent Slide: What Do Current Valuation Models Suggest?
summary: If you are wondering whether Medtronic stock is offering good value at its recent price, this article focuses squarely on what the current share price implies about the company. Medtronic recently closed at US$79.27, with the share price roughly flat over the past month, edging up 0.9%, while year to date it has fallen 17.5% and is down 4.9% over the past year. Recent coverage of Medtronic has centered on its position in medical devices and how investors are weighing long term demand for its...
